task_completion.description: Import the sales_data.csv file into Power BI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data' or 'Fields' pane on the right side of the Power BI interface shows the loaded table (e.g., 'sales_data') with its respective columns.

The Data pane shows 'Margin_Per_Unit' and 'Performance_Tier' with a calculated column icon (a small table with a sigma/fx symbol). The DAX formula bar may also be visible showing the formulas for these columns.

task_completion.description: Create a Table visual with Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, and Performance_Tier
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table visual is present on the report canvas containing exactly the columns: Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, and Performance_Tier.

task_completion.description: Apply background color scale conditional formatting to Sales_Amount
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Table visual, the cells under the 'Sales_Amount' column have varying background colors (a color scale/gradient) based on their values.

task_completion.description: Create a Gauge visual for Average of Discount with a target of 0.10
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gauge visual (semi-circle) is on the canvas. The main value shows the Average of Discount (approximately 0.15 or 15%), and there is a distinct target line or target value indicator set to 0.10 (or 10%).
The title bar at the top of the Power BI Desktop window reads 'Rep_Scorecard - Power BI Desktop', or there is a file explorer window showing 'Rep_Scorecard.pbix' saved on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the Power BI Desktop GUI to build the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Power BI Desktop application open with active interactions (menus, panes, canvas) rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the .pbix file.

integrity.description: Visuals are populated with actual data from the dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table and Gauge visuals display realistic data (e.g., Gauge shows ~0.1524, Table shows actual sales rep names and regions) rather than static text boxes, mockups, or empty visuals.

integrity.description: Conditional formatting is applied via Power BI features, not manually drawn
integrity.visual_evidence: The color scale in the Table visual is perfectly aligned with the cell backgrounds and corresponds to the numerical values, indicating the use of Power BI's built-in conditional formatting rather than overlaid shapes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Power BI report from 'sales_data.csv'. Verify two calculated columns exist: 'Margin_Per_Unit' and 'Performance_Tier'. The Table visual must include Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, and Performance_Tier, with a background color scale (fillRule) on Sales_Amount. The Gauge visual must show the Average of Discount (actual data average is ~0.1524 or 15.24%) against a target value of 0.10 (10%). The final file must be named 'Rep_Scorecard.pbix'.
